name: Siemens N-EUPEX Flexible Coupling Size 200
description: The Siemens Flender N-EUPEX is a flexible pin and bush coupling for compensating shaft misalignment and dampening torsional vibrations. Size 200 with max torque 1,400 Nm, suitable for pump, fan, and compressor drives.
shortDescription: Flexible pin and bush coupling, size 200, 1,400 Nm, up to 4,000 rpm.
technicalDescription: Flexible coupling with elastic polyurethane bushes and steel pins. Two-piece hub design with clamping fit. Axial plug-in assembly for blind installation. Temperature range -30°C to +100°C.
features: Elastic polyurethane bushes for vibration dampening
Compensates for radial, axial, and angular misalignment
Blind assembly capability with axial plug-in
benefits: Protects connected machines from torsional shocks
Simplifies alignment with generous misalignment capability
Reduces bearing loads in connected equipment
seoDescription: Siemens Flender N-EUPEX 200 flexible pin and bush coupling, 1,400 Nm, vibration dampening. For pumps, fans, and compressors.

faq.question: What is the service life of the elastomer bushes?
faq.answer: Typical service life is 3-5 years depending on operating conditions and misalignment.

faq.question: Can the elastomer elements be replaced?
faq.answer: Yes, the polyurethane bushes are replaceable without removing the hubs from the shafts.

faq.question: What colors indicate the elastomer hardness?
faq.answer: Red (standard, 95 Shore A), Yellow (soft), and Green (hard) are available for different damping requirements.

name: Lovejoy L099 Jaw Coupling (Spider Insert)
description: The Lovejoy L099 jaw coupling with spider insert provides flexible power transmission between shafts in industrial machinery. Size L099 handles 35 Nm with split-in-half assembly without moving connected equipment.
shortDescription: Jaw coupling L099, 35 Nm, spider insert, 12-25mm bore range, steel hubs.
technicalDescription: Standard jaw coupling with two steel hubs and polyurethane spider insert. Bores available from 12 to 25mm with keyway. Zero-backlash NBR spider standard. Temperature range -40°C to +100°C.
features: Compact envelope compared to other coupling types
Fail-safe design - spider fails first to protect equipment
benefits: Quick element replacement without moving equipment
Cost-effective solution for general industrial drives
seoTitle: Lovejoy L099 Jaw Coupling | 35 Nm, Steel Hubs
seoDescription: Lovejoy L099 jaw coupling with spider insert, 35 Nm, 12-25mm bore, steel hubs. For motor-pump and gearbox drive connections.

faq.question: What is the maximum misalignment?
faq.answer: Angular misalignment up to 1°, parallel misalignment up to 0.38mm, and axial up to 0.8mm.

faq.question: How often should the spider be replaced?
faq.answer: Inspect annually. Replace when visible wear, cracking, or set occurs. Typically every 2-3 years.

faq.question: What colors indicate spider hardness?
faq.answer: NBR standard (white/beige), Polyurethane (various colors depending on durometer).

name: Rexnord GR-200 Gear Coupling Full Flex
description: The Rexnord GR-200 gear coupling provides high torque transmission in heavy industrial applications. With crowned and barreled tooth design, it accommodates significant misalignment while transmitting 10,000 Nm.
shortDescription: Full flex gear coupling, size 200, 10,000 Nm, crowned teeth, continuous lubrication.
technicalDescription: Continuous sleeve gear coupling with crowned and barreled hub teeth for high misalignment capacity. Flanged sleeve design with O-ring seals. Grease-packed for maintenance-free operation. AGMA 9 quality.
features: Crowned and barreled tooth profile for high misalignment
Continuous sleeve design with O-ring seals
High torque capacity in compact package
benefits: Handles extreme misalignment in heavy machinery
Long service life in harsh environments
seoTitle: Rexnord GR-200 Gear Coupling | Full Flex
seoDescription: Rexnord GR-200 full flex gear coupling, 10,000 Nm, crowned teeth, grease-packed. For steel mills, cement mills, and heavy industry.

faq.question: What is the re-lubrication interval?
faq.answer: The grease-packed design is maintenance-free for the life of the coupling. No re-lubrication required.

faq.question: What is the maximum bore available?
faq.answer: Standard maximum bore is 90mm. Custom bores up to 110mm available on request.

faq.question: Can this coupling be used in reversing service?
faq.answer: Yes, the symmetrical gear tooth design handles bidirectional rotation equally well.

name: Siemens ARNULF Grid Coupling Size 100
description: The Siemens ARNULF grid coupling uses a spring steel grid element for high torque capacity with torsional flexibility. Size 100 transmits 2,500 Nm with excellent shock absorption for reciprocating and variable load drives.
shortDescription: Grid coupling size 100, 2,500 Nm, spring steel grid, flexible.
technicalDescription: Grid coupling with spring steel serpentine grid element, two flanged hubs, and split cover halves. Grid provides torsional flexibility and dampens shock loads. ATEX certified for hazardous areas.
features: Spring steel grid for torsional flexibility
Split cover for easy grid inspection
benefits: Protects drive train from torsional shock loads
High misalignment capacity with grid design
Suitable for high-temperature and hazardous environments
seoDescription: Siemens Flender ARNULF 100 grid coupling, 2,500 Nm, spring steel grid, ATEX. For compressors, pumps, and conveyor drives.

faq.question: What is the grid replacement interval?
faq.answer: Grid life is typically 3-5 years depending on load cycles. Grids are field-replaceable.

faq.question: What lubrication is required?
faq.answer: A special grid coupling grease (NGLI 1) is applied during assembly. Re-lubricate annually or every 2,000 hours.

faq.question: Can this coupling be used vertically?
faq.answer: Yes, but special lubrication provisions are recommended for vertical shaft applications.

name: Rexnord DC-150 Disc Coupling, Stainless Steel
description: The Rexnord DC-150 stainless steel disc coupling provides zero-backlash, maintenance-free power transmission for critical turbomachinery. With all-metal construction and 1,500 Nm capacity, it handles high temperatures and corrosive environments.
shortDescription: Stainless steel disc coupling, 1,500 Nm, zero-backlash, maintenance-free.
technicalDescription: Double-flex disc coupling with 316 stainless steel hubs and discs. Zero-backlash diaphragm disc pack. No lubrication required. Suitable for high-speed turbomachinery up to 10,000 rpm.
benefits: Eliminates coupling maintenance in critical service
Withstands harsh environments and high temperatures
No wear parts - 20+ year service life
seoTitle: Rexnord DC-150 Stainless Steel Disc Coupling
seoDescription: Rexnord DC-150 stainless steel disc coupling, 1,500 Nm, zero-backlash, maintenance-free. For gas turbines, compressors, and high-speed pumps.

faq.question: What is the maximum temperature rating?
faq.answer: The all-metal design operates from -100°C to +300°C.

faq.question: Does this coupling need lubrication?
faq.answer: No, the disc coupling is completely maintenance-free with no lubrication required.

faq.question: What is the balance grade?
faq.answer: Standard balance is G6.3. Higher balance grades (G2.5, G1.0) are available for high-speed applications.
